data.reasoningText:
The project uses Microsoft.Testing.Platform (via `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`). To produce a TRX report with `dotnet test`, I need to pass the appropriate option. With the new testing platform, the TRX report can be generated using `--report-trx`.

Let me run the tests with TRX reporting.

data.reasoningText:
The `--report-trx` flag isn't being recognized properly. This is because the Microsoft.Testing.Platform TRX report requires passing arguments differently. With the new testing platform and `dotnet test`, the `--report-trx` option needs to be passed after `--` to forward it to the test runner, or use the `--` separator.

Let me try passing it after `--`:
